chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2604 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ اَلرَّجُلِ يُحْرِمُ فِي ثَوْبٍ لَهُ عَلَمٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2604 - It was narrated from Al-Halabi, who said:
I asked Imam (as) about a man entering Ihram wearing a garment with an embroidered border.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
